en-US.Title: Mid Level .NET Developer III
en-US.JobDescription: Development of internal systems for insurance management, using .NET MAUI, ASP.NET, Blazor, and SQL Server. Participation in test and process automation projects and API integration.

en-US.Title: Mid Level .NET Developer
en-US.JobDescription: Development of internal systems for task automation, using .NET Framework WinForms, Angular, ASP.NET, Xamarin, .NET Core, and SQL Server. Participation in test automation projects and migration of legacy SOAP service code to REST.

en-US.Title: Jr .NET Developer
en-US.JobDescription: Development of fixes for internal task automation and testing systems; User support and validation of the daily execution of the tool's automations via CI/CD in automated dashboards. Participation in the integration of the execution of the developed product's automations with the RPA UI PATH.

en-US.Title: Jr .NET Developer
en-US.JobDescription: Development of applications for an internally produced IoT product. Using .NetStandard, Xamarin, Azure IoT Hub, Azure Functions, and Azure Blob Storage.

en-US.Title: Jr .NET Developer
en-US.JobDescription: Development of commercial IP telephony systems for company clients, using .NET Framework, WinForms, WPF, MySQL, MariaDB, Java, and Xamarin Forms. Participation in user support processes and pairing for release deployments.

pt-BR.Title: Analista de desenvolvimento Pleno III

pt-BR.Title: Analista de Desenvolvimento Pleno

pt-BR.Title: Analista de Desenvolvimento Jr
pt-BR.JobDescription: Desenvolvimento de correções para sistemas internos de automação de tarefas e testes; Suporte a usuários e validação da execução diaria das automações da ferramenta via CI/CD em dashboards automatizados. Participação da integração da execução das automações do produto desenvolvido junto ao RPA UI PATH.

pt-BR.JobDescription: Desenvolvimento de sistemas de telefonia IP comercializados para clientes da empresa, utilizando .NET Framework, WinForms, WPF, MySQL, MariaDB, Java e Xamarin Forms. Participação em processos de suporte à usuários e pairing para deploy de releases.
